heroHeadline: 56 Nations Commit to Follow-Up Fossil Fuel Exit Summit as Santa Marta Conference Closes
heroSubtitle: 3,791 days since the Paris Agreement — the First International Conference on Transitioning Away from Fossil Fuels concluded in Santa Marta, Colombia (Apr 24–29), with 56 nations and 2,600+ organizations forming a 'highest ambition coalition' demanding a binding fossil fuel phase-out treaty. Global clean energy investment hit a record $2.3 trillion in 2025. Solar led world energy demand growth for the first time in history.
footerNote: Data sourced from IEA, IRENA, IPCC, UNEP, BloombergNEF, and major international outlets. All figures reflect verified, publicly available data through April 2026.
